## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. …
2. …
3. …

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include **redacted** logs if relevant (logs are
secret-redacted by default — double-check before pasting).

## Component

- [ ] Web app (`apps/web`)
- [ ] Bridge daemon (`bridge`)
- [ ] Database / migrations (`supabase`)
- [ ] CI / tooling
- [ ] Docs

## Environment

- OS:
- Node / pnpm version:
- Adapter in use (mock / claude-code / codex-cli / …):
- Commit or version:

## Additional context

Screenshots, related issues, anything else.

> Security vulnerability? **Do not** file it here — see [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md).
